images.title: Cherry Blossom Dream
images.description: Make this girl a stunning young woman in a flowing lavender dress twirls gracefully under blooming cherry blossom trees... The path beneath her is covered in soft pink petals, creating a dreamy, romantic springtime atmosphere. Strictly preserve the original face: do not modify facial features, identity, skin tone, or expression. Ensure the face remains exactly the same as the input image. images.title: Golden Heritage Portrait
images.description: Convert this person into a timeless portrait draped in a golden Banarasi saree, with a flower tucked into the hair. The lighting is golden and artistic, casting a soft glow. The background is textured but simple, like an art-house poster.

images.title: Vintage Saree Elegance
images.description: Create a realistic portrait of a woman in a translucent white polka-dot saree with matching blouse. A soft pink flower is tucked behind her ear, and warm light from the side casts a cinematic shadow. She exudes vintage diva energy.

images.title: Classic Red Romance
images.description: Transform the subject into a classic Bollywood heroine in a flowing red chiffon saree, hair styled in soft waves. Background should be warm-toned, minimalist, with glowing sunset light giving a romantic and dramatic mood.

images.title: Retro Bollywood Muse
images.description: Turn this person into a 90s retro-inspired portrait wearing a shimmering black chiffon saree. The background is a deep wall with dramatic shadows, lit by golden-hour tones. Expression is calm yet mysterious, evoking old Bollywood posters.

images.title: 90s Retro Breeze
images.description: Reimagine this photo in a retro, grainy yet bright style. The subject wears a purple chiffon saree with a playful, moody vibe. She stands in front of an old wooden door as wind blows through her hair, evoking a 90s cinematic scene

images.title: Misty Morning Calm
images.description: Transform this image into an early morning outdoor scene with light natural fog. The environment is calm with soft trees fading into the background. Use diffused natural light through fog, creating gentle contrast and soft shadows. Colors should be slightly muted and realistic. Add depth with subtle background blur. Strictly preserve the original face: do not modify facial features, identity, skin tone, or expression. Ensure the face remains exactly the same as the input image. images.title: Dreamscape Magic
images.description: Transform this image into a breathtaking dreamy outdoor scene. Place the girl in a beautiful natural location such as a flower field, lakeside, or tree-lined path with soft blooming elements. Add gentle wind movement to her hair and dress, making the scene feel alive. Slightly adjust her pose to a natural candid moment, like she is turning, walking slowly, or looking into the distance. Lighting should be soft and magical but realistic—golden hour or diffused daylight with natural highlights and shadows. Add subtle floating particles like petals or dust catching light, very minimal and natural. Use shallow depth of field with soft background blur and strong subject focus. Composition should feel like a professional photoshoot with balanced framing. Strictly preserve the original face exactly as in the input image. Do not change identity, facial features, skin tone, or expression. Shot on DSLR, 85mm lens, f/1.8 aperture, cinematic photography style, ultra-detailed, natural color grading. avoid artificial look, no excessive glow, keep natural lighting and realistic textures

images.title: Lakeside Serenity
images.description: Transform this image into a serene lakeside scene during early morning or late afternoon. The girl stands near still water that reflects the sky and surroundings clearly. Add a gentle breeze moving her hair and outfit naturally. Slightly adjust her pose to a calm candid moment, like she is looking at the water or turning slowly. Lighting is soft and natural, with subtle reflections on the water. Add light ripples for realism. Use shallow depth of field with soft background blur. Maintain perfect realism in textures, lighting, and shadows. Strictly preserve the original face with no changes to identity, facial features, skin tone, or expression. images.title: Timeless Noir Portrait
images.description: Hyper-realistic 8K monochrome portrait of a woman, dramatic shadows, high contrast, fine details in hair and eyes, timeless artistic style.

images.title: Desk Figurine Creator
images.description: Create a 1/6 scale commercialised figurine of the characters in the picture, in a realistic style, in a real environment. The figurine is placed on a computer desk. The figurine has a round transparent acrylic base with no text on the base. The content on the computer screen is the ZBrush modelling process of this figurine. Next to the computer screen is a BANDAI-style toy packaging box printed with the original artwork. The packaging features two-dimensional flat illustrations.

images.title: Cinematic Street Editorial
images.description: Ultra-realistic cinematic street portrait in a narrow European city street, tall stone buildings, blurred storefronts, pedestrians as soft silhouettes. Subject standing in the middle of the street, slightly angled, confident gaze. Wearing a black overcoat + black scarf, minimal stylish vibe. Lighting: overcast daylight, smooth shadows, balanced contrast. Colour grading: cinematic teal-orange, soft desaturated background, natural skin tones. Camera: DSLR 85mm lens, f/1.8, medium waist-up shot, vertical 4:5. Style: cinematic editorial, modern, confident, timeless magazine look.

images.title: Monsoon Love Scene
images.description: Turn the uploaded photo into a cinematic 90s Bollywood rain sequence. The subject wears a dark saree, drenched and glistening, with dramatic rain falling in the background. Lighting is moody and romantic, capturing monsoon nostalgia.

images.title: GTA Character Style
images.description: Turn my photo into a Grand Theft Auto (GTA) style character portrait. Use the signature GTA art style — bold outlines, high contrast shading, and vibrant, slightly exaggerated colors. Capture the streetwise, comic book-inspired aesthetic seen in GTA loading screens and promotional posters. Add a dramatic urban background with elements like palm trees, sports cars, city buildings, or helicopters depending on the vibe. Keep the pose confident and cool, like a GTA protagonist.

images.title: Neon Street Glow
images.description: Edit the photo to place the girl in a neon-lit street at night, casual t-shirt, cinematic bokeh effect in the background.

images.title: Modern Blazer Edit
images.description: Enhance this image into a clean, professional fashion photoshoot while keeping the original pose exactly unchanged. Do not modify body posture, stance, or positioning. Dress the girl in a modern, well-fitted blazer with sleeves naturally rolled up to the elbows (half folded sleeves). The folds should look realistic and slightly imperfect, like naturally styled, not overly neat. Keep the styling minimal and elegant. Place her in a simple, refined environment such as a clean street, soft neutral background, or subtle greenery. Background should be uncluttered and softly blurred using shallow depth of field. Lighting should be soft natural daylight, evenly balanced with realistic shadows and highlights. No dramatic or cinematic lighting—keep it like a real fashion photoshoot. Add a very subtle natural breeze to slightly move her hair, but keep it minimal and believable. Ensure proportions, textures, and fabric details (especially blazer folds) are realistic and high quality. Strictly preserve the original face exactly as in the input image. Do not alter identity, facial features, skin tone, or expression. Shot on DSLR, 85mm lens, f/2 aperture, professional fashion photography style, clean composition, ultra-detailed. Avoid artificial look, no excessive glow, keep natural lighting and realistic textures.
